title: Payment processing systems
author: joesimon
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Businesses can accept payments for goods and services using credit cards, debit cards, and cheques thanks to  payment processing systems . These systems verify the information obtained during the transaction by sending it to the organization or bank that issued the card in question for confirmation. Before finalizing the transaction, the sponsoring organization will implement a number of anti-fraud steps. Before the transaction may be cleared, each of these payment procedure steps needs to be completed. We provide the technology that is best for systems that handle payments since it regularly has the lowest end-to-end processing latencies. This is the end result of integrating data processing, messaging, and elastically scalable storage for caching data from external systems into a single solution.
